scripts.electron:dev: npm run electron:compile && concurrently -k "next dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && electron ."
scripts.electron:build: next build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:build:win: next build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:build:mac: next build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:build:linux: next build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.yml
